meaning: Digital Versatile Disk 数字光盘
examples: The DVD can be rented from your local store.
Pirate copies of the DVD are already being sold.
With DVD, you can watch the latest movies in the comfort of your own home.
Its product line consists of televisions, digital cameras, MP3 players, DVD players and videocassette recorders.
People will see HD DVD as an incremental inexpensive alternative to the next generation HD movie format.
